title: SageAttention3: Microscaling FP4 Attention for Inference and An Exploration of 8-Bit Training
core_contribution: First FP4 microscaling attention kernel achieving 1038 TOPS on RTX5090 (5x FlashAttention) via two-level quantization, plus the first trainable 8-bit attention (SageBwd) enabling lossless fine-tuning.
summary: SageAttention3 leverages Blackwell's FP4 Tensor Cores with NVFP4 microscaling quantization. Two-level quantization for softmax output P expands [0,1] range to use more E4M3 scale values, improving CosSim from 93.32% to 99.52%. SageBwd extends INT8 per-block quantization to attention backward, keeping the most sensitive GEMM (dO·V^T) in FP16. Results: 1038 TOPS on RTX5090, 3x end-to-end HunyuanVideo speedup, lossless fine-tuning but slower pretraining convergence.
key_findings: FP4 attention achieves 1038 TOPS on RTX5090, 5x faster than FlashAttention2
Two-level quantization improves softmax output FP4 CosSim from 93.32% to 99.52%
NVFP4 significantly outperforms MXFP4 for attention quantization
INT8 trainable attention (SageBwd) matches BF16 in fine-tuning but converges slower in pretraining
dO·V^T is the most accuracy-sensitive backward GEMM — must remain FP16
HunyuanVideo 3x speedup (489s→164s) with no quality degradation
limitations: FP4 only works on Blackwell GPUs, no backward compatibility
SageBwd pretraining convergence is notably slower — not viable for pretraining
SageBwd actual speedup (1.1-1.15x) far below theoretical due to Triton implementation
No evaluation on LLM long-context prefill scenarios

infra_impact.algorithm: Proves low-bit attention viable for fine-tuning; pretraining convergence issue opens new research direction
infra_impact.kernel: First FP4 attention kernel; two-level quantization is generalizable FP4 softmax technique
infra_impact.framework: Plug-and-play PyTorch API replacing FlashAttention; CUTLASS+CUDA inference, Triton training
infra_impact.llm: Massive speedup for video/image generation; fine-tuning acceleration; LLM prefill impact to be validated
infra_impact.agent: 5x attention speedup significantly reduces real-time generation latency

open_questions: Can mixed-precision scheduling solve pretraining convergence?
How does FP4 attention perform in LLM prefill and decode?
Can two-level quantization extend to FP4 GEMM beyond attention?
Can SageBwd be ported to AMD CDNA4?
